name: @wawp/mcp-server
description: Official Wawp WhatsApp API MCP Server. Connect your AI (Cursor, Claude, Windsurf) directly to WhatsApp for automation and messaging.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && sed -i '1s/^/#!\/usr\/bin\/env node\n/' dist/index.js && sed -i 's/\r$//' dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js

author: Wawp Team
